---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you are experiencing. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you would like to happen and how it should work.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you have considered, and why you prefer the proposed approach.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
